content: Laravel 11 validation: combining numeric (or integer) with min:N/max:N/gte:N/lte:N performs true numeric comparison, not string comparison. A dynamic bound (e.g. a question's points value from a route-bound model) is not required to be another request field — rules() can compute the literal bound server-side from the resolved route-model, e.g. 'score' => ['required','numeric','min:0','max:'.->points].
